items.prompt: determines congruence or similarity and solves bounded figure problems using rigid motions, dilations, and proportional reasoning
items.expected_evidence: solve bounded triangle or polygon similarity/congruence tasks using structural reasoning
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner uses valid transformation or scale-structure reasoning rather than appearance alone.

items.prompt: explains how rigid motions establish congruence and how dilations establish similarity through scale factor and preserved angle structure
items.expected_evidence: explain how scale factor changes side lengths while preserving angle structure
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains congruence and similarity as structural relationships rather than labels.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to congruence_similarity_conflation.
items.expected_evidence: justify congruence through rigid-motion reasoning and similarity through dilation or proportional correspondence
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer confused equal-size and same-shape relationships.

items.prompt: applies congruence or similarity reasoning in a less-familiar geometric, coordinate, or contextual setting
items.expected_evidence: identify corresponding features consistently across congruent and similar figures
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves correct correspondence and scale logic in a varied setting.
